versions.version_description: The ACTUAL chords "sus4", "m7", etc...of this song as well as every single chord change are composed just for you, from me.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Style by Taylor Swift
Album: 1989
Track 3
2014


Standard Tuning
Capo on the 7th fret


Chords:

[ch]Em[/ch]:      x22000
[ch]C[/ch]:       x32010
[ch]Am7[/ch]:     x02010
[ch]D[/ch]:       xx0232 
[ch]G[/ch]:       320003 or 320033



You can replace [ch]Am7[/ch] by [ch]Am[/ch] (x02210)

(To play without a capo replace the chords above by [ch]Bm[/ch], [ch]G[/ch], [ch]Em7[/ch], [ch]A[/ch] and [ch]D[/ch])


[Intro]

[ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]      x 2


[Verse]

[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
 Midnight, you come and pick me up[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
 No headlights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                                         [ch]C[/ch]
 A long drive, could end in burning flames or paradise[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Em[/ch]                                                  [ch]C[/ch]
 Fade into view, oh, it's been a while since I have even heard from you[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]
 I should just tell you to leave cause I[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]C[/ch]
 Know exactly where it leads but I[/tab]
[tab]                                   ([ch]D[/ch])
 Watch us go round and round each time[/tab]

 
[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
 You got that James Dean daydream look in your eye[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
 And I got that red lip classic thing that you like[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
 And when we go crashing down, we come back every time[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
 You got that long hair, slicked back, white t-shirt[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
 And I got that good girl faith and a tight little skirt[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
 And when we go crashing down, we come back every time[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab] [ch]Em[/ch]
 So it goes[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C[/ch]
 He can't keep his wild eyes on the road[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Em[/ch]
 Takes me home[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C[/ch]
 Lights are off, he's taking off his coat[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]                                               [ch]C[/ch]
 I say I heard, oh, you've been out and about with some other girl, some other girl[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Am7[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]
 He says what you heard is true but I[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]C[/ch]
 Can't stop thinking about you and I[/tab]
[tab]                                   ([ch]D[/ch])
 I said I've been there too a few times[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
 You got that James Dean daydream look in your eye[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
 And I got that red lip classic thing that you like[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
 And when we go crashing down, we come back every time[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
 You got that long hair, slicked back, white t-shirt[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
 And I got that good girl faith and a tight little skirt[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
 And when we go crashing down, we come back every time[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]          [ch]G[/ch]
 Take me home[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
 Just take me home[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 Just take me home[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
 You got that James Dean daydream look in your eye[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]
 And I got that red lip classic thing that you like[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]G[/ch]
 And when we go crashing down, we come back every time[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 Cause we never go out of style, we never go out of style[/tab]
